title: Trump says ‘clock ticking’ for Iran as peace negotiations stall
summary_full: Washington, locked in a war with Iran since US and Israeli forces launched strikes in late February, has struggled to break an impasse in negotiations
summary_public: Washington, locked in a war with Iran since US and Israeli forces launched strikes in late February, has struggled to break an impasse in negotiations
